value: large obesity and diabetes demand; product revenue already commercial-scale
workflow_interpretation: Demand is real but this case does not independently size the addressable patient pool.
Need prescription/channel or physician adoption evidence before external sharing.

value: Mounjaro/Zepbound commercial products and FDA-verified Foundayo approval/label
workflow_interpretation: Clinical and regulatory evidence is strong enough for internal publication, while safety and adherence still need monitoring.

value: FDA announced Foundayo approval and FDA label confirms obesity/overweight indication
workflow_interpretation: Regulatory source gap is closed; maintain safety and label-monitoring refresh triggers.

value: Lilly announced all three largest US PBMs will cover its obesity portfolio; CVS independently confirmed Foundayo block removal on 2026-06-01 and Zepbound preferred-option return on 2026-10-01
workflow_interpretation: Access evidence improved materially, but all-PBM claim and plan-level adoption still need independent confirmation.

value: CMS Medicare GLP-1 Bridge begins 2026-07-01 for eligible Part D beneficiaries and includes Foundayo and Zepbound KwikPen; China NRDL affected Mounjaro realized prices outside the US
workflow_interpretation: Government reimbursement can expand volume while pressuring realized price and adding prior authorization friction.

value: Zepbound lower realized prices included previously announced cash-pay price reductions
workflow_interpretation: Cash-pay price changes are a key demand and margin variable.

value: Q1 2026 revenue had 65% volume growth offset by 13% lower realized-price effect
workflow_interpretation: Net price pressure is already visible and must be a core thesis variable.

value: CMS GLP-1 Bridge eligibility requires prior authorization criteria; commercial plan approval still varies by plan
workflow_interpretation: Access expansion is not the same as frictionless access; authorization should remain a stop-rule variable.
Chronic therapy value depends on persistence beyond initial uptake.

value: Novo Nordisk is direct GLP-1 peer; other oral/next-gen drugs may affect formulary positioning
workflow_interpretation: Competition matters through payer bargaining and product differentiation.

value: CMS Bridge and FDA label create official policy/regulatory anchors
workflow_interpretation: Policy direction currently supports access, but program implementation and safety label changes remain refresh triggers.
